creator: cliff.spradlin@gmail.com
text:
When the kernel is loading, it hangs with the last message showing:

atrtc0: <AT realtime clock> port 0x70-0x7f irq 8 on acpi0

See screenshot at http://twitpic.com/q7gqj .

Seems to have started in 7, still present in 8.0 RC3.  i386 works, it's
just amd64 that fails.

How-To-Repeat: Boot up the installer for M600
